stmt: ∀ {Γ : List Tp} {A : Tp}, (∀ x ∈ Γ, is_atom x) → Γ ⇒ A → is_atom A ∧ Γ = [A]
∀ {Γ : List Tp} {A : Tp}, (∀ x ∈ Γ, is_atom x) → Γ ⇒ A → ∃ s : String, Γ = [Tp.atom s]
∀ N : Nat, ∃ Γ : List Tp, ∃ A : Tp, list_degree Γ + tp_degree A = N ∧ Γ ⇒ A ∧ FocusedTree (N + 1) Γ A ∧ ∀ m < N + 1, ¬ FocusedTree m Γ A
∀ N : Nat, 2 ≤ N → ∃ Γ : List Tp, ∃ A : Tp, list_degree Γ + tp_degree A = N ∧ Γ ⇒ A ∧ FocusedTree (N + 1) Γ A ∧ ∀ m < N + 1, ¬ FocusedTree m Γ A

For every derivation d : Γ ⇒ A, if every formula in A :: Γ is LeftDivisionOnly then d can be transformed into a derivation of Γ ⇒ A using no right-division rules, and if every formula in A :: Γ is RightDivisionOnly then d can be transformed into one using no left-division rules.
